title: American Frittata
description: A classic American breakfast dish made with eggs, a great way to use up leftover ingredients.
instructions: In a large skillet, heat 2 tablespoons of oil over medium heat.
Add the diced ham and cook until lightly browned, about 3-4 minutes.
In a large bowl, whisk together the eggs, shredded cheese, and a pinch of salt and pepper.
Pour the egg mixture over the cooked ham in the skillet.
Cook the eggs for about 2-3 minutes, until the edges start to set.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 12-15 minutes, or until the eggs are set and the frittata is golden brown.
Remove the skillet from the oven and sprinkle with chopped parsley.
Let the frittata cool for a few minutes before slicing and serving.
Serve warm, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
